body:
## Summary
- Adds a Home-only rewarded extra mock exam card after the daily free exam is used.
- Requires completing the sponsor preview before calling the rewarded ad flow and granting a stored exam credit.
- Keeps `/exam` as a stored-credit consumer with no ad-triggering UI, and aligns the unlocked exam CTA copy with the Home flow.
- Consolidates the duplicate LegalPage import that was keeping lint red on current main.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run lint`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:monetization`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-mock-exam-runtime-parity.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:ownership`
- `npx --no-install prettier --check 'app/(tabs)/home.tsx' 'app/(tabs)/exam.tsx' app/sources.tsx scripts/validate-content.js scripts/monetization.test.js`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `CI=1 E2E_PORT=4194 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/rewarded-web-preview.spec.ts --workers=1`
title: feat: surface rewarded mock exam unlock on Home
